nasb.text: But the woman said to him, “Behold, you know what Saul has done, how he has cut off those who are mediums and spiritists from the land. Why are you then laying a snare for my life to bring about my death?”

esv.text: The woman said to him, “Surely you know what Saul has done, how he has cut off the mediums and the necromancers from the land. Why then are you laying a trap for my life to bring about my death?”

cnv.text: 那女人回答他：“你是知道掃羅所作的，他已經把交鬼的和行巫術的，都從國中剪除了，你為甚麼要陷害我的命，使我死呢？”

ccb.text: 妇人对他说：“你知道扫罗铲除了国内占卜的和行巫术的，你为何来陷害我，置我于死地？”
